headline: Assessing CoStar Group (CSGP) Valuation After Activist Scrutiny Of Homes.com Transparency
summary: Activist pressure around CoStar Group (CSGP) has intensified after D. E. Shaw and Third Point criticized the company’s new reporting structure for Homes.com, arguing that reduced disclosure hurts accountability and has coincided with sharp share price volatility. See our latest analysis for CoStar Group. That activist campaign sits against a weak recent trading backdrop, with CoStar’s 90 day share price return of negative 36.05% and 1 year total shareholder return of negative 44.58% pointing...
